description: Observation methods the Layers appview publishes. Each method folds pub.layers.* firehose events into a pub.layers.observation.* record. Hand-written ObservationMethod impls live in layers-observer/src/methods/<name>.rs; codegen emits the registry.

methods.name: annotation_coverage
methods.description: Fraction of expressions in a corpus that have at least one annotation layer targeting them.

methods.name: agreement_by_layer
methods.description: Mean pairwise agreement per annotation layer, using pub.layers.judgment.agreementReport.

methods.name: corpus_growth
methods.description: Record-count deltas per corpus over time, bucketed daily.

methods.name: lens_adoption
methods.description: Invocation counts of Layers-defined panproto lenses, grouped by (source, target) schema pair.
